token-to-USDC swaps for both the pari-mutuel betting module      and the streaming module (donations / subscriptions). No LP vault      involved \u2014 USDC flows directly into the match contract (the escrow)      on the betting path, and directly to streamers on the streaming path. Supported Payment Paths (all settle in USDC): \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550 BETTING (pari-mutuel):   CHZ  (native) -> USDC -> PariMatch.placeBetUSDCFor  (placeBetWithCHZ)   ERC20         -> USDC -> PariMatch.placeBetUSDCFor  (placeBetWithToken)   USDC direct   ->         PariMatch.placeBetUSDCFor  (placeBetWithUSDC) STREAMING (donations & subscriptions):   CHZ  (native) -> USDC -> fee split -> streamer / treasury   ERC20         -> USDC -> fee split -> streamer / treasury   USDC direct   ->         fee split -> streamer / treasury Security notes:   - This contract requires SWAP_ROUTER_ROLE on each target PariMatch proxy.   - USDC is forwarded immediately; this contract never holds USDC at rest.   - bettingMatchFactory (PariMatchFactory) validates every match address     before USDC is forwarded, preventing loss to arbitrary addresses.   - Reentrancy protected via OpenZeppelin ReentrancyGuard.   - SafeERC20 used for all token transfers.   - Strict deadline + slippage validation on every swap.","errors":{"AddressEmptyCode(address)":[{"details":"There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract)."}],"AddressInsufficientBalance(address)":[{"details":"The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation."}],"FailedInnerCall()":[{"details":"A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted."}],"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"placeBetWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amountOutMin":"Minimum USDC from the swap (slippage protection).","bettingMatch":"Address of the PariMatch proxy.","deadline":"Unix timestamp deadline for the swap.","marketId":"Market identifier.","outcome":"Chosen outcome index."}},"placeBetWithToken(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Token amount the caller intends to spend.","amountOutMin":"Minimum USDC from the swap.","bettingMatch":"Address of the PariMatch proxy.","deadline":"Unix timestamp for swap expiry.","marketId":"Market identifier.","outcome":"Chosen outcome index.","token":"ERC20 to swap (fan token, WCHZ, etc.)."}},"placeBetWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint64,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"USDC amount (caller must approve this contract first).","bettingMatch":"Address of the PariMatch proxy.","marketId":"Market identifier.","outcome":"Chosen outcome index."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"title":"ChilizSwapRouter","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"bettingMatchFactory()":{"notice":"PariMatchFactory \u2014 validates that bettingMatch addresses are legitimate         before any USDC is forwarded. Must be set before any placeBetWith* call."},"placeBetWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Swap exact native CHZ for USDC and take a position in a pari-mutuel market."},"placeBetWithToken(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Swap any ERC20 for USDC and take a pari-mutuel position."},"placeBetWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint64,uint256)":{"notice":"Take a position directly with USDC (no swap)."},"platformFeeBps()":{"notice":"Platform fee in basis points for streaming (e.g. 500 = 5%)."},"setMatchFactory(address)":{"notice":"Register the PariMatchFactory so that bettingMatch addresses are validated         before USDC is forwarded. Must be set before any placeBetWith* call."},"streamWalletFactory()":{"notice":"StreamWalletFactory for wallet lookup/creation."},"treasury()":{"notice":"Platform treasury for streaming fee collection."}},"notice":"Unified swap router for the ChilizTV platform (pari-mutuel owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.amountOutMin: Minimum USDC from the swap (slippage protection).
params.deadline: Unix timestamp deadline for the swap.

params.amount: Token amount the caller intends to spend.
params.token: ERC20 to swap (fan token, WCHZ, etc.).

params.amount: USDC amount (caller must approve this contract first).

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

bettingMatchFactory().notice: PariMatchFactory — validates that bettingMatch addresses are legitimate         before any USDC is forwarded. Must be set before any placeBetWith* call.

placeBetWithCHZ(address,uint256,uint64,u.notice: Swap exact native CHZ for USDC and take a position in a pari-mutuel market.

placeBetWithToken(address,uint256,addres.notice: Swap any ERC20 for USDC and take a pari-mutuel position.

placeBetWithUSDC(address,uint256,uint64,.notice: Take a position directly with USDC (no swap).

platformFeeBps().notice: Platform fee in basis points for streaming (e.g. 500 = 5%).

setMatchFactory(address).notice: Register the PariMatchFactory so that bettingMatch addresses are validated         before USDC is forwarded. Must be set before any placeBetWith* call.

treasury().notice: Platform treasury for streaming fee collection.
